fields.name: Christian Cross with Pet Paw Prints and Beloved Son Inscription
fields.desc: A clean, heartfelt design featuring a simple outlined Christian cross on the left and a charming pet tribute on the upper right with the name 'Rebel' accompanied by three paw prints. The family name is presented in bold, prominent lettering with the endearing phrase 'Always In Our Hearts' completing the composition.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to families who want a personal Christian design that also honors a beloved pet companion alongside their loved one.

fields.name: Doves with Heart and Forever In Our Hearts Banner with Ceramic Portraits
fields.desc: A beautifully carved design featuring two doves carrying olive branches flanking a centered heart, all beneath a graceful banner reading 'Forever In Our Hearts.' Two oval ceramic photo portraits are inset on the left and right sides, adding a deeply personal touch to this multi-generational family tribute honoring a grandmother, mother, and aunt.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to families honoring multiple generations who want a heartfelt design with doves, a heart, banner, and ceramic photo portraits.

fields.name: Doves with Olive Branches, NY Giants Helmet, and Puerto Rican Flag
fields.desc: This heartfelt design features two doves carrying olive branches at the center, symbolizing peace and hope. A New York Giants football helmet is carved on the upper left, honoring a beloved sports passion, while a waving Puerto Rican flag on the upper right celebrates cultural heritage and family pride.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to customers who want to honor both their cultural heritage and sports passions with meaningful symbolic carvings like doves, a football helmet, and a national flag.

fields.name: Hummingbirds with Tropical Flowers and Graceful Inscription
fields.desc: This heartfelt design features two delicately carved hummingbirds flanking the upper corners, with a beautiful cluster of hibiscus flowers and foliage adorning the left side. The elegant script name is framed by a carved interior border, complemented by the touching inscriptions 'A Woman of Grace and Dignity' and 'In God's Loving Care.'

meta.SalesUse: Show this to families of Hispanic heritage who want a nature-inspired design with hummingbirds and flowers that conveys grace and faith.

fields.name: Christian Cross with Ivy Leaves and Serenity Prayer Inscription
fields.desc: A heartfelt design featuring a centered Christian cross flanked by beautifully shape-carved ivy leaves on each side, framed within a classic carved border. The top of the piece bears the inscription 'God Grant Me Serenity,' adding a meaningful spiritual touch. The family name is prominently displayed in bold lettering with a loving dedication to a beloved mom and grandmother.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to a Christian family who wants a traditional design with nature-inspired ivy carvings and a meaningful prayer inscription honoring a mother or grandmother.

fields.name: Floral Cluster with Decorative Banner and Beloved Father Inscription
fields.desc: A beautifully shape-carved floral cluster of flowers and leaves adorns the lower left corner, adding a gentle natural touch. A flowing decorative banner frames the family name and dates, while the heartfelt inscription 'Beloved Father' is elegantly carved above the bold lettering. The clean traditional design is framed by a subtle carved border with rounded inner corners.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to families honoring a beloved father who want a traditional floral design with clean, classic lettering and a tasteful decorative border.

fields.name: Shape Carved Cross with Roses, Knights of Columbus Emblem, and Music Notes
fields.desc: This heartfelt design features a prominent Knights of Columbus emblem on the upper left, a centered cross entwined with roses, and delicate music notes on the lower right corner, reflecting faith and a love of music. Floral vine accents frame the upper right corner, adding a graceful touch. The family name is boldly carved in a recessed panel with the endearing inscription 'Forever In Our Hearts' below.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to Catholic couples or Knights of Columbus families who want a faith-centered design with personalized hobby elements like music notes and elegant floral accents.

fields.name: Shape Carved Roses with Interlocking Hearts and USVI Inscription
fields.desc: The family name is prominently displayed in a carved rectangular banner across the top, flanked by beautifully shape-carved rose clusters on each side. A pair of interlocking hearts inscribed with 'USVI' sits centered between the two names, adding a personal touch of love and heritage to this classic floral design.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to couples or families who want a traditional companion design with elegant rose carvings and a personal touch like interlocking hearts.

fields.name: Cross with Roses and Paw Prints - Forever In Our Hearts
fields.desc: A centered cross sits atop a beautifully shaped scroll banner bearing the family name, flanked by elegantly shape-carved roses with flowing stems in each upper corner. Below the heartfelt inscription 'Forever In Our Hearts,' two small paw prints are carved between the couple's names, adding a tender tribute to a beloved pet.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to couples who want a traditional Christian design with roses and a personal pet tribute through paw print carvings.

fields.name: Dove with Flanking Rose Bouquets and Framed Lettering
fields.desc: The design features a centered dove carrying a flower, flanked by beautifully carved rose bouquets in each upper corner. The family name is displayed prominently within a framed panel, with the heartfelt inscription 'Forever In Our Hearts' carved along the base in its own bordered panel, creating a warm and classic composition.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to families honoring a beloved mother or grandmother who wants a classic dove and roses design with a warm sentimental inscription.

fields.name: Hand Sculpted Roses with Dual Crosses and Arched Family Name
fields.desc: A beautifully carved design featuring lush rose bouquets flanking both sides of an elegantly arched family name banner. Each corner is adorned with a Christian cross rising above the roses, creating a reverent and symmetrical presentation. The lower section is divided into two neatly paneled areas for Father and Mother inscriptions, framed by clean recessed borders.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to Catholic or Christian couples who want a traditional companion design with roses, crosses, and an elegant arched family name presentation.

fields.name: Hand Sculpted Roses with Christian Cross
fields.desc: A beautifully hand-sculpted cascade of roses adorns the upper left corner, adding a graceful floral touch to this warm brown granite design. The family name is boldly carved across the center, with a small Christian cross elegantly placed between the two names and dates below. The recessed panel with rounded border lines creates a refined, traditional framing for the inscriptions.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to couples or families who want a traditional Christian design with hand-sculpted floral accents and a warm brown granite tone.

fields.name: Shape Carved Roses with Open Book and Ceramic Photo
fields.desc: This heartfelt design features shape carved roses adorning both upper corners with flowing stems, framing the inscription beautifully. An open book motif is carved at the base of the text, symbolizing a life's story, while a ceramic portrait photo adds a deeply personal touch. The inscription 'In God's Care' lends a comforting religious sentiment to the overall design.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to a family honoring a beloved daughter who wants a personalized design with carved roses, an open book, and a ceramic photo portrait.

fields.name: Shape Carved Heart with Doves, Butterflies and Roses
fields.desc: A beautifully shape-carved heart frames the inscription, flanked by a pair of graceful doves in flight and delicate butterflies at the top corners. Carved roses adorn the lower sides of the heart, while a flowing ribbon banner at the bottom reads 'Our Beloved Queen At Rest,' adding a deeply personal and loving tribute.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to a customer who wants a romantic heart-centered design with doves, butterflies, and roses honoring a beloved woman.

fields.name: Double Hearts with Interlocking Rings, Crosses, and Banner
fields.desc: A beautifully shape-carved design featuring two large hearts joined by interlocking wedding rings at the center, flanked by ornate Christian crosses on each upper corner. A decorative scroll banner at the top displays the family name, while delicate carved flowers adorn the lower corners and a 'Forever In Our Hearts' ribbon completes the heartfelt tribute.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to companion families of Christian faith who want a heartfelt design featuring double hearts, interlocking rings, and crosses to honor a beloved mom and grandmother.

fields.name: Double Hearts with Crosses, Scroll Banner, Floral Center, Paw Print and Shamrock
fields.desc: A beautifully carved design featuring two intertwined hearts flanked by Latin crosses on each upper corner, connected by a scroll banner reading 'In God's Care.' A lush floral arrangement with leaves and a central bloom adorns the space between the hearts, while a paw print on the lower left and a shamrock on the lower right add meaningful personal touches.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to companion families who want a heartfelt design combining religious crosses, double hearts, and personalized symbols like paw prints and shamrocks to honor loved ones.

fields.name: Shape Carved Heart with Roses and Scroll Banner
fields.desc: A beautifully shape carved heart frames the inscription, adorned with detailed roses on both sides and delicate vine accents. A decorative scroll banner at the bottom carries the heartfelt phrase 'Forever In Our Hearts,' creating a warm tribute honoring a beloved mother, grandmother, and great-grandmother.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to families who want a heartfelt heart-and-roses design with a sentimental banner honoring a cherished matriarch.

fields.name: Shape Carved Heart with Roses and Forever Banner
fields.desc: A beautifully shape carved heart frames the inscription, adorned with elegant roses and flowing leaves at the lower left and right corners. A decorative scroll banner beneath reads 'Forever In Our Hearts,' adding a tender and loving sentiment to the classic floral design.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to families who want a heartfelt heart and roses design with a sentimental banner honoring a beloved mother or grandmother.

fields.name: Shape Carved Double Hearts with Roses and Crosses
fields.desc: This beautifully carved design features two intertwined hearts adorned with elegant roses at the center and base, flanked by two Latin crosses on either side. The heartfelt inscription 'In God's Care, Forever In Our Hearts' is displayed on a carved banner above the hearts. The combination of floral and Christian elements creates a warm, devotional tribute full of love and faith.

meta.SalesUse: Show this to Christian families who want a heartfelt design combining double hearts, roses, and crosses with a meaningful religious inscription.
